events.title: GNSS Simulation for Autonomous/Intelligent Connected Vehicles and Low-Altitude Economy Applications Webinar
events.actionStatus:
Online event - participation TBC 3000e ? 
Warning : new event requested a budget participation
events.notes:
Requested by: Danny and local partner, Tesight.
BL: ST4D Simulation.
Topic: Webinar covering industry trends and challenges in GNSS simulation testing, core capabilities of GNSS simulators, fundamental principles and test configurations for GNSS signal simulation, and Skydel software operation. It provides customers with a comprehensive and detailed introduction to GNSS simulators and their applications. Tesight also plan to invite industry experts to participate in the webinar and seek partnerships with media outlets, aiming to reach over 300 contacts.
The 2025 live stream on related topics attracted 52 clients, and we are actively following up on these leads.
Warning : new event requested a budget participation 
Tesight Cost: €6,000
Request for co-sponsor: €3,000
Action:  Confirm Safran budget to support this webinar.
